add.description: Specification for default quantity behavior when adding items to cart is missing. API contract requires explicit default quantity of 1.
add.reason: LLD does not specify the default quantity behavior.

add.requirement_reference: Automatic recalculation of subtotal and total upon any quantity mutation (Story Summary)
add.description: LLD does not explicitly document the automatic recalculation trigger mechanism and sequence for subtotal/total updates on quantity changes.
add.reason: LLD lacks explicit documentation for recalculation logic.

add.requirement_reference: Empty cart state must trigger specific UI redirection ('continue shopping' link) (Story Summary)
add.description: LLD does not specify the empty cart state handling and redirection mechanism.
add.reason: LLD lacks UI behavior for empty cart state.

add.requirement_reference: CartItem entity with current Price Snapshot (Story Summary)
add.description: LLD CartItem entity does not explicitly document the 'current Price Snapshot' field required to preserve pricing at time of cart addition.
add.reason: LLD data model is incomplete for CartItem.

add.requirement_reference: ShoppingCart entity bound to user session or ID (Story Summary)
add.description: LLD does not specify session binding mechanism for ShoppingCart entity.

add.requirement_reference: API endpoints require comprehensive error handling specifications (Implicit from API Contracts)
add.description: LLD does not document error scenarios and HTTP status codes for cart operations.
LLD does not specify the complete response structure including individual subtotals and cart total.
add.reason: LLD API response format is incomplete.

add.requirement_reference: Quantity validation and constraints for cart operations (Implicit from Business Logic)
add.description: LLD does not specify quantity validation rules (min/max values, data type, inventory checks).
add.reason: LLD lacks validation rules for cart operations.

modify.current_state: PUT /api/v1/cart/items/{itemId} endpoint assumed to exist but lacks detailed specification.
modify.required_change: Enhance specification to include request payload structure, validation rules, and idempotency behavior for quantity updates.
modify.reason: LLD API endpoint specification needs enhancement.

modify.current_state: Generic component description exists for Quantity Updater Component.
modify.required_change: Enhance specification to align with story requirements for quantity update interactions.

modify.current_state: Basic entity definitions exist for ShoppingCart and CartItem.
modify.required_change: Enhance data model to include all required attributes, relationships, and constraints specified in the story.

delete.description: Cart sharing, wishlist integration, or saved-for-later features.
delete.reason: These features are not part of the current story scope and should be addressed in separate stories.
